name_en: In Stock Chanel✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Flap Bag
name_cn:
In Stock Chanel✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Flap Bag
Imported Calfskin Full Hardware 🌺
Classic Pearlized Apricot New Color, Calfskin Grained, Light Apricot
Twist closure with sliding chain, shoulder or crossbody interchangeable. The bag looks exquisite, stylish and versatile. This pink-gold color really grabs attention🤩 A mix of girly and sophisticated. With light gold hardware, it looks very queenly
Size 25.5 15 6cm
No.: 1112
